calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-16-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-31-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated July 27, 2014 is admitted to probate. Kelli M. Quon is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for September 16, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
